name: yonxao-mindmap
description: Obsidian plugin for rendering Markdown topic-level mind maps from yxmm code blocks.

scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:css
scripts.build:check: npm run build:check:js && npm run build:check:css
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run lint && npm run format:check
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run build && npm run build:check
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run build:check && node scripts/prepare-plugin-dir.mjs && node scripts/copy-hotreload.mjs
scripts.dev:check: npm run check && npm run dev
scripts.release: npm run check && npm run clean && npm run build && npm run build:check && node scripts/prepare-plugin-dir.mjs && npm run release:body

author: yonxao
